perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with two women standing in a Costco warehouse, each holding a large, plush animal-themed triangular pillow (a pink rabbit and a grey cat). A large Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) One woman, wearing a navy beret, points to the cat pillow while the other holds the rabbit one, both smiling and speaking enthusiastically. (3) The camera stays static as they demonstrate the size of the pillow by holding it against their bodies and showing its triangular profile. (4) They pivot to show how the pillow can be used behind the back for support, with a playful 'Kao Yao' text appearing. (5) The video ends with a close-up of the cat pillow, highlighting its blue eyes.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic pop-style background music plays throughout. (2) Two female voices are heard speaking in Mandarin with a high-pitched, excited, and promotional tone. They introduce the product and its price. (3) Ambient warehouse noise is minimal, largely masked by the music and clear studio-quality voiceovers. (4) The audio maintains a consistent tempo and volume until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' (Functional, top center). (2) '429元 小巧實用' (Functional, price and utility hook). (3) '最可愛的三角靠墊' (Decorative, emotional hook meaning 'Cutest triangle cushion'). (4) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom translating the spoken Mandarin. (5) '靠腰' (Decorative/Pun text appearing with a lightning effect for emphasis on back support).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Demo -> Use Case Illustration -> Closing Hook

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female presenters are visible throughout the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and is wearing a white dress; the other has shoulder-length hair, a navy beret, and a dark off-the-shoulder top with a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring high metal shelving units, cardboard shipping boxes (one labeled 'fraiche'), and various plush merchandise in the background.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even industrial lighting typical of a retail warehouse.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price/Variety -> Physical Specs -> Use Cases -> Closing Sentiment
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and mini-review intended to drive sales of animal-themed triangular cushions at Costco. By emphasizing the low price (429 TWD), the variety of designs (bear, rabbit, cat), and multi-functional uses (lumbar support, elbow rest in cars or on sofas), the content creators leverage their friendly and enthusiastic personas to influence viewers' purchasing decisions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are specifically showcasing a product at Costco, highlighting its price and benefits, which aligns with social media 'must-buy' recommendation content.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy female duo presentation with variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a very common 'Haul' or 'Must-Buy' format popular in Taiwanese social media (Costco finds). The use of the word '靠腰' is a common humorous pun in Taiwanese Mandarin, playing on its literal meaning (leaning on the waist) and its status as a slang exclamation.
